chats.title: Dead & Phish Time Machine
chats.last_completed: Evaluated InnoMaker DAC alternatives and chose the HiFi DAC Hat (PCM5122, GPIO passthrough) to replace the HiFiBerry and eliminate the soldering step
chats.next_step: Order the InnoMaker HiFi DAC Hat; when it arrives, move the year-encoder SW from GPIO6→GPIO20 in PINOUT.md + config.py, then wire all components per PINOUT.md
chats.breadcrumb: DAC path switched. Replacing HiFiBerry DAC+ Pro (no GPIO passthrough → required a soldered stacking header) with the InnoMaker HiFi DAC Hat (PCM5122, female passthrough — no soldering). Manual-confirmed taps: I2C GPIO2/3, I2S GPIO18/19/21, mute GPIO6, IR GPIO26. IR is an unpopulated reserved footprint (U3, no-solder) → no conflict with fast-forward on GPIO26. Only real conflict: mute GPIO6 vs year-encoder SW → relocate SW to GPIO20 (the one free pin). Overlay: dtoverlay=allo-boss-dac-pcm512x-audio (enumerates as BossDAC), documented for Pi OS Lite.
chats.agent_can_do: Draft the PINOUT.md + config.py edits to move the year-encoder SW from GPIO6 to GPIO20, plus the allo-boss-dac-pcm512x-audio overlay setup steps for the InnoMaker DAC Hat on Pi OS Lite
chats.agent_can_prep: Generate a component-by-component wiring checklist from PINOUT.md (each button/encoder -> its BCM pin and breakout terminal) plus the raspi-config serial-console disable steps

chats.title: Car — New Tires
chats.last_completed: Agent prep complete — tire comparison researched (5 options)
chats.next_step: Choose a tire and get quotes from Belle Tire, Discount Tire, or Costco
chats.breadcrumb: Tire comparison done 6/8. CrossClimate 2 is the top pick for Detroit winters (3PMSF certified, cheaper per set than Defender 2). Defender 2 wins on longevity. Current tire: General Altimax RT43.
chats.notes:
## Tire Comparison — P235/50R18

| Tire | Warranty | Est. Installed/set | Winter | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Michelin CrossClimate 2 | 60,000 mi | ~$790–840 | Excellent (3PMSF) | Best for Midwest winters; 34% shorter snow stop than Defender 2 |
| Michelin Defender 2 | 80,000 mi | $950–1,120 | Good (M+S only) | Best long-term mileage; quieter ride |
| Yokohama Avid Ascend GT | 65,000 mi | $950–1,100 | Good | Best budget of the top 3 |
| Goodyear Assurance ComfortDrive | 65,000 mi | $1,050–1,300 | Very good | Mid-tier |
| General Altimax RT43 (current) | ~50,000 mi | ~$650–850 | Below avg | Cheapest upfront; not recommended re-buy for Detroit winters |

**Top pick:** Michelin CrossClimate 2 for winter safety + value. Defender 2 if mileage matters more than grip.
**Where to quote:** Belle Tire (price-match), Discount Tire, Costco.
